vlm_note: Clean 8-piece opening board. Colours per meta: ThePhantom=BLACK, hakutamu=RED. Read against the CV's own vertex overlay (board fitted from empty_baseline, residual 0.85px). ThePhantom settlements v6, v21 (roads v6-v2, v21-v20); hakutamu settlements v8, v18 (roads v8-v7, v18-v16). GRANT SELF-CHECK PASSES: ThePhantom's grant {SHEEP:2, WOOD:1} equals exactly v6's hexes (WOOD5+SHEEP6+SHEEP10) and NOT v21's (BRICK9+WHEAT10+WHEAT5); hakutamu's grant {BRICK:1, ORE:1, WOOD:1} equals exactly v8's hexes (WOOD5+ORE8+BRICK3) and NOT v18's (DESERT+SHEEP8+WHEAT10). Each grant matches EXACTLY ONE settlement, so the glyph anchor independently corroborates this localization.
